# Themis

Themis is a network operations change-management system. It manages devices, golden configs,
config drift, approvals, comments, scheduled deployments, deployment attempts, RBAC, AD/LDAP,
and OAuth/OIDC login.

API documentation:
- Human/API explorer: /docs.html
- OpenAPI spec: /openapi.yaml
- Agent manifest: /.well-known/themis-agent.json
- OpenAI plugin-compatible manifest: /.well-known/ai-plugin.json

Authentication:
- Use POST /api/auth/login to receive a JWT.
- Send Authorization: Bearer <token> on protected API calls.
- OAuth browser login starts at /api/auth/oauth/start.

Common workflows:
- List devices: GET /api/devices
- Create a change: POST /api/devices/{device_id}/changes
- Create a batch change: POST /api/changes/batch
- Approve a change: POST /api/changes/{change_id}/approve
- Deploy with streaming output: GET /api/changes/{change_id}/deploy
- List config drift: GET /api/drift
- Revert drift to golden config: POST /api/devices/{device_id}/revert-golden

Safety notes:
- Viewer users are read-only.
- Engineers cannot approve their own changes.
- Deployments may stream Server-Sent Events.
- Admin-only endpoints are under /api/admin.
